analysis: The refined HSC-PE approach with a dynamic attention gate (soft gating mechanism) further improved the mean validation loss from 1.5573 (simple concatenation) to 1.5074. By using the concatenated (BEV features + Semantic PE + Cartesian PE) context to generate an alpha mask via a local spatial MLP, the network can smoothly interpolate between map-guided embeddings (Semantic distances) for road-constrained classes and ego-centric geometries (Cartesian embeddings) for off-road/unconstrained elements. This effectively addresses the limitations of rigidly assigning semantic anchors to the entire point cloud.
